content: shadcn/ui fully supports Tailwind CSS v4 and React 19 (Feb 2025+). CLI initializes with Tailwind v4, @theme directive, OKLCH colors. All components updated. New-york style is default. tailwindcss-animate deprecated. Each primitive has data-slot attribute. Works in TanStack Start via Vite. Copy-paste approach — no dependency on shadcn package, components owned by the project.
